sources.finding: Spawning rules and monitoring steps — no TaskOutput guidance before fix
Agent Teams architecture: TaskList + SendMessage auto-delivery pattern
TaskOutput supports background shell, agent, or remote session
cleanup_session() already uses --force for worktree removal

summary: name@team_name composite IDs are invalid — Claude Code uses opaque system-generated IDs
TaskOutput officially supports agents, but cnogo foreground spawning makes it irrelevant
The assertion is correct in practice but overstates TaskOutput's general scope
Fix should explain WHY TaskOutput doesn't apply (foreground + auto-delivery) not just prohibit it
recommendation: Refine team.md Step 11 wording to be precise: foreground agents report via TaskList/SendMessage, not TaskOutput. The prohibition is architecture-specific, not a general TaskOutput limitation.
